rule: Exact stamped evidence only when a Battle Academy product page states deck cards have colored silhouettes/marks and a deck-list TCG ID row matches an existing remaining stamped gap.

records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia Battle Academy deck reprints with colored silhouettes and deck-order numbers where applicable
records.notes: Exact Battle Academy deck-list card matched to an existing remaining stamped gap. Evidence phrase: cards within the decks are reprints but have colored silhouettes; Cinderace and Pikachu decks also have a number next to the silhouette.
